subcodes.first_line: Man is even as a tree, and trees yield diverse fruits; verily, a goodly tree must needs bring forth delectable fruit that its true nature [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مثل انسان مثل شجر است و اشجار متنوّع الاثمار ، شجره طيّبه البتّه بايد ثمره جنيّه ببار آرد تا آنکه هويّت و ماهيّتش
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @law of pilgrimage, @bringing forth results; fruit, @love and unity
